name: PayPal Payments
description: Orders, payments, subscriptions, payouts via PayPal's official MCP

env_vars.how_to_set: PayPal's MCP requires an OAuth access token. Steps: 1) Go to developer.paypal.com → My Apps → Create App 2) Copy Client ID + Secret 3) Get access token: curl -X POST https://api-m.paypal.com/v1/oauth2/token -u 'CLIENT_ID:SECRET' -d 'grant_type=client_credentials' 4) Paste the access_token here. See: developer.paypal.com/api/rest/authentication

tools.name: create_order
tools.description: Create a new PayPal order with line items, currency, and purchase unit details for checkout

intent.description: Order intent: CAPTURE to capture payment immediately or AUTHORIZE to authorize only

amount.description: Amount object with currency_code (e.g. USD) and value (e.g. 49.99)

return_url.description: URL to redirect the buyer after approval

cancel_url.description: URL to redirect the buyer if they cancel

tools.name: capture_payment
tools.description: Capture payment for an approved PayPal order, finalizing the transaction and moving funds

order_id.description: The PayPal order ID to capture payment for

tools.name: get_order
tools.description: Retrieve the details and current status of a PayPal order by its order ID

order_id.description: The PayPal order ID to retrieve

tools.name: list_transactions
tools.description: List PayPal transaction history for the account within a specified date range

start_date.description: Start date for the transaction list in ISO 8601 format (e.g. 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z)

end_date.description: End date for the transaction list in ISO 8601 format

transaction_status.description: Filter by status: S (success), P (pending), V (reversed), F (denied)

tools.name: create_invoice
tools.description: Create a PayPal invoice with line items, due date, and recipient details for billing

recipient_email.description: Email address of the invoice recipient

items.description: Array of invoice line items with name, quantity, unit_amount, and currency

due_date.description: Invoice due date in YYYY-MM-DD format

note.description: Optional note or memo to include on the invoice
